title: Cisco IOS XE zero-day with active exploitation (CVE-2024-20399)
content: Cisco has confirmed active exploitation of a privilege escalation vulnerability in IOS XE Software when the web UI feature is enabled. Unauthenticated remote attackers can create a local user with privilege level 15. Affected devices include enterprise routers and WAN edge appliances used for site connectivity. Disable the web UI on internet-facing devices and apply the fixed release immediately. CVE-2024-20399.
